final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire [3:0] req,
    output reg [3:0] grant
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            grant <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            grant <= 4'b0000; // Reset grant
            if (req[0]) grant <= 4'b0001; // Highest priority
            else if (req[1]) grant <= 4'b0010;
            else if (req[2]) grant <= 4'b0100;
            else if (req[3]) grant <= 4'b1000; // Lowest priority
        end
    end
endmodule
